title: Third Fleet (disambiguation)
content:
'''Third Fleet''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Third Fleet]]''', of the [[Imperial Navy]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Imperial Third Fleet]]''', of the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]].
*'''[[Confederate Third Fleet]]''', of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].
*'''[[New Republic Third Fleet]]''', of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].
*'''[[Galactic Alliance Third Fleet]]''', of the [[Galactic Alliance Defense Fleet]].
*'''[[Coruscant Third Fleet]]''', of [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire]], stationed at [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
*'''[[Outer Rim Third Fleet]]''', of [[Darth Krayt]]'s Galactic Empire, stationed in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].
{{Disambig}}

|es=Tercera Flota (desambiguación)
